name: code-break-predictor
description: Claude Code plugin for predicting future code breakpoints, scalability bottlenecks, and technical debt from code changes.
author: Fenil Ramoliya

commands.name: predictor
commands.description: Orchestrates future-break analysis for diffs, commits, and file changes.

agents.name: break-analyzer
agents.description: Analyzes code changes and predicts future scalability, reliability, and debt failures.
